title: Actinostemon oligandrus
taxonomy: Actinostemon oligandrus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. This family is commonly known as the spurge family. The Euphorbiaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants that includes over 2,800 species. Actinostemon oligandrus is native to the Americas and is often found in dry or open areas. The classification of Actinostemon oligandrus at the genus and species levels reflects its evolutionary relationships and characteristics.

intro: Actinostemon oligandrus, commonly known as the "golden cane," is a species of flowering plant in the Euphorbiaceae family. The health benefits of Actinostemon oligandrus include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
